CustomField.formula: CASE( MONTH(Renewal_Date__c) , 01 , TEXT(YEAR(Renewal_Date__c))+"-Q1" , 02, TEXT(YEAR(Renewal_Date__c))+"-Q1", 03, TEXT(YEAR(Renewal_Date__c))+"-Q1", 04, TEXT(YEAR(Renewal_Date__c))+"-Q2" , 05, TEXT(YEAR(Renewal_Date__c))+"-Q2", 06, TEXT(YEAR(Renewal_Date__c))+"-Q2", 07, TEXT(YEAR(Renewal_Date__c))+"-Q3", 08, TEXT(YEAR(Renewal_Date__c))+"-Q3", 09, TEXT(YEAR(Renewal_Date__c))+"-Q3" , TEXT(YEAR(Renewal_Date__c))+"-Q4")
CustomField.label: Renewal Quarter
